title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at KFC India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at KFC India
jsonLd.description:
KFC India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About KFC India:
KFC India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with KFC India!
